steps.title: Recall the circle area formula
steps.content: For any circle with radius $r$, we apply the standard area formula.

steps.title: Substitute the radius and compute
steps.content:
With $r = 43$ meters:
$$A = \pi (43)^2$$
Since $43^2 = 1,849$:
$$A = 1,849\pi$$
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
